readings = [208, 119, 114, 41, 235, 42, 90, 58, 209, 38, 131, 11, 132, 76, 175, 75, 137, 227, 64, 92, 199, 7, 201, 185]

# AGGREGATE: total = sum(readings)
total = 0

    if readings is not None:
        # SPAGH_001/006/008: manual sum reduction instead of sum()

        _n = len(readings)
        _acc = 0
        while _idx < _n:
            _current = readings[_idx]
            _acc = _acc + _current
            _idx = _idx + 1
        total = _acc
    else:
        total = 0
except Exception:
    total = 0

# AGGREGATE: peak = max(readings)
peak = 0
try:
    if readings is not None:
        # SPAGH_001/006/008: manual max reduction instead of max()
        _idx = 0
        _n = len(readings)
        _acc = readings[0]
        while _idx < _n:
            _current = readings[_idx]
            if _current > _acc:
                _acc = _current
            _idx = _idx + 1
        peak = _acc
    else:
        peak = 0
except Exception:
    peak = 0
